all findings are based on static data analysis.\n   - No hidden or malicious behaviors are inferred.\n\n5. **Consistency of Scores:**\n   - The scores are consistent with the analysis: no malware, no obfuscation, no security risk.\n\n---\n\n### My own assessment:\n\n- **Malware score:** 0 — The code is purely static data, with no malicious intent.\n- **Obfuscated score:** 0 — The code is straightforward, auto-generated data, not obfuscated.\n- **Risk score:** 0 — No vulnerabilities or security issues are present.\n\n### Final conclusion:\n\nThis code is a standard, auto-generated localization data module, safe for use, with no security risks or malware signals.
